items.name_en: Three colors available 🔮🔮🔮 Large H Real photos 🍠🍠🍠 25B New 🆕 Accordion Bag 🚩🚩🚩 Sparkling Rhinestones 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Mimi Accordion Bag CHANEL Rhinestone Handle Accordion Bag 🎹 Dual-tone crystal handle is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a piece of art. The double-layer accordion style has a large capacity and can hold 2 phones 📱, a very practical bag 😄. The double C buckle design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and lovely~ The goat leather is very unique! Feels very durable! It can make you look refined with any outfit. 4831 Dimensions: 11*18.5*6cm/

items.name_en: Three colors, two sizes available🌟🌟🌟🌟 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C latest woven flap bag, handmade woven bag, woven shopping bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements that are indispensable in vacation vibes, using imported natural wheat straw grass. Just didn't expect so many bright suede material handbags to appear in the summer vacation series... Matching for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, jewelry embellishments are a must on the handbag, the collector's series ice cream cup is the favorite~ Dimensions: 26cm, 23cm

items.name_en: Two sizes available 🚩🚩🚩 Large H Real photos 🌟🌟🌟 "Export Product" Shipped 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality 🔮🔮🔮 Price is a bit high 😯 Ohanel 25A "Dark Horse" Backpack. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, with a large internal patch pocket. Retro matte gold hardware, large capacity, fits daily items 👍🏻. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, the long shoulder strap is adjustable. Size: 18*24*6cm/5347

items.name_en: Upgraded chip hardware~Apricot restock❤️Ohanel 19 Handbag
items.name_cn:
Upgraded chip hardware~Apricot restock❤️Ohanel 19 Handbag
As Chanel's significant number, '19' continues the brand's classic naming convention, representing the year it was born, 2019, just like the 2.55 handbag launched by Mademoiselle Chanel in February 1955❗️
Flap bag Small size Apricot ZP leather Fully in stock!!
Light and soft sheepskin texture combined with the large diamond quilted design element
Three carrying ways: crossbody, shoulder, hand-held
Chain splicing: antique gold, antique silver, bright silver
Small size dimensions: 16x26x9cm (image)

items.name_en: Velvet🤩 Double Flap 2.55 Classic New Model《Burgundy Wine🍷》🚩🚩🚩OHANEL New CF Hidden Model🙈 Really beautiful at first glance, I just🤩🤩 love this simple style, it's more versatile and durable💖 The special thing is that usually the shoulder strap is made of cowhide with a chain, this pairing of coffee leather with a chain shoulder strap is more high-end and retro, a fashionable item!

items.name_en: Victoria Beckham style Chanel Black Ball Grain
items.name_cn:
Victoria Beckham style Chanel Black Ball Grain
 Discontinued Large Gold Clasp Bag❤️
In Stock. The Chanel Classic Flap Bag was reintroduced by Karl Lagerfeld in 1983 after taking over Chanel, and it is his most proud masterpiece. The large CF is very popular among celebrities and bloggers.
Its highlight is the large gold double C logo; current boutique versions no longer have this design, featuring only small double Cs. Victoria Beckham likes to shorten the chain and use it as a handbag.
It features a double-sided flap design with large capacity for a chain bag, lightweight, can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or as a handbag with a shortened chain.
Recommend buying the Victoria Beckham bag😘
Size 30.21.8cm
 Serial No. A2222

items.name_en: Victoria Beckham Style Chanel Sheepskin Apricot
items.name_cn:
Victoria Beckham Style Chanel Sheepskin Apricot
Out of Print Large Gold Clasp Bag❤️
In Stock. The Chanel Classic Flap Bag was re-released by Karl Lagerfeld in 1983 after taking over Chanel. It is also Lagerfeld's most proud masterpiece. This large CF is very popular among celebrities and bloggers.
Its highlight is the large double C logo with gold plating. The current boutique version no longer has this design; they all have small double Cs. Victoria Beckham likes to shorten the chain of this bag and use it as a handbag.
It features a double-sided flap design with a large capacity for a chain bag. It is lightweight and can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a handbag with a shortened chain.
Recommended to buy the Victoria Beckham bag😘
Size 30 21.8cm
No.: A2222
